text: Did you know you can create a fully functional AI telephony agent in minutes? . It’s true! VideoSDK lets you build agents that handle both inbound and outbound calls. . Imagine the possibilities! .

Ready to dive in? First, you need Python 3.12 or higher. . Then, sign up for a free VideoSDK account to get your VIDEOSDK_TOKEN. . You’ll also need a SIP provider like Twilio to direct calls to VideoSDK. .

Let’s build that AI agent! Start with the main.py file. That’s where the magic happens. . Use Routing Rules to dispatch calls to your self-hosted agent. . Don’t forget the requirements.txt for your Python packages! .

What powers this setup? It’s all about the architecture! SIP providers connect calls to VideoSDK’s robust telephony infrastructure. . This allows seamless call handling and intelligent routing. . And with your .env file, your credentials stay safe! .
So, are you ready to unleash the power of AI in telephony? Start building your agent today! . The future of communication is here! . Don’t miss out on this game-changing technology! .
